description: Legal document written by a Muslim notary, bottom half only. Contains three witnesses' attestations, dated 562 (?). On verso, written in various directions, there are five discrete addenda with attestations, all beginning "aʿrafa" and referring to the content of the main document on recto.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
